title: Cyclops
description: Unleash the ancient power of the Cyclops into your world!
body:
Unleash the ancient power of the Cyclops into your world!
This massive, one-eyed giant roams the land with brute strength and intimidating size.

🔥 Features:
👁️ Custom 3D model with smooth GeckoLib animations:

Idle, walking, attacking, dying, and spawning animations

🗡️ Powerful melee attacks — beware if you're unprepared!

🌄 Spawns naturally during night

🎨 High-quality texture and detailed Blockbench model

📜 Lore:
Once a creature of ancient legends, the Cyclops now wanders the overworld. Its single, glaring eye watches intruders with primal fury. Engage it at your own risk!

🛠️ Technical:
Built with MCreator + GeckoLib

Requires Forge and GeckoLib

Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1
